heading: Selection of Yucca Mountain site
label: 10172 Selection of Yucca Mountain site
notes: Codificationand added identical sections.Pub. L. 100–202Pub. L. 100–203

children.text: The Secretary shall provide for an orderly phase-out of site specific activities at all candidate sites other than the Yucca Mountain site.
The Secretary shall terminate all site specific activities (other than reclamation activities) at all candidate sites, other than the Yucca Mountain site, within 90 days after .December 22, 1987

children.heading: Eligibility to enter into benefits agreement
children.label: b Eligibility to enter into benefits agreement
children.text: Effective on , the State of Nevada shall be eligible to enter into a benefits agreement with the Secretary under .December 22, 1987section 10173 of this title
